pageContext.name: Joker 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: THE JOKER™ is Next in our Faces of Gotham™ Collection!  Our DC Coin Collection for the Faces of Gotham™ continues. This time it's the face of the lover of chaos, THE JOKER™, presented on a shaped and colored 1oz pure silver coin.  This unique coin follows the shape of THE JOKER's grinning face, with light relief on the front of the coin giving it a more 3D feel. Each coin in the collection is packaged inside the same compact, modern, branded case – designed with a window to enable you to display the prize inside. The Certificate of Authenticity can be found on the back of the case along with the coin's number in the limited 5,000 mintage.   If you've got your BATMAN™ and ROBIN™ coins, why not add this DC Super-Villain today?
